faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Highbridge?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Highbridge typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500 depending on the size of your home, severity of infestation, and treatment method chosen. We offer free inspections and detailed quotes for all Highbridge residents, with pricing based on square footage and the number of rooms affected.

faqs.question: What bed bug treatment methods do you use in Highbridge apartments?
faqs.answer: We offer both heat treatment and targeted chemical applications approved for use in Bronx residential buildings. Heat treatment raises room temperatures to 135°F to kill bed bugs at all life stages, while our chemical treatments use EPA-registered products safe for families and pets. Our technicians will recommend the best approach based on your specific situation and building type.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a bed bug problem in Highbridge?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for Highbridge residents facing bed bug emergencies. Our local Bronx team can typically schedule an inspection within 24 hours and begin treatment shortly after. We understand that bed bugs spread quickly in multi-unit buildings, so fast response is our priority.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your bed bug treatment in Highbridge?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our bed bug treatments come with a comprehensive guarantee that includes follow-up inspections and re-treatment if necessary.
